query:
SELECT 
  pn.id,
  pn.number,
  pn.numberDisplay,
  pn.serviceCode,
  pn.description,
  pn.customerId,
  pn.status
FROM phone_numbers pn
WHERE pn.provider = 'ChannelHaus'
ORDER BY pn.serviceCode
LIMIT 30;
